title: Lineage tracking example dataset
author: Zangle, Thomas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Example dataset to accompany: Jingzhou Zhang, Justin Griffin, Koushik Roy, Alexander Hoffmann, and Thomas A Zangle, “Tracking of Lineage Mass via Quantitative Phase Imaging and Confinement in Low Refractive Index Microwells,” bioRxiv, doi: 10.1101/2024.03.27.587085. For processing with github.com/Zangle-Lab/Lineage_tracking Dataset contains: - good_well_list.mat: list of wells with single cells at the start of imaging in the example files - good_well_list_full: full list of wells used for processing - dividing_well_list.mat: list of divisions in provided example files - dividing_well_list_full: full list used for processing - QPM20x_4.zip and QPM 20x_10.zip: ZIP files containing QPM20X_LOC_frame_FRAMENUM.mat where LOC = [4,10] and FRAMENUM = [1,2881]: mat files with computed phase shift at each location - QPM20x_10_tif.zip: ZIP file containing QPM20X_LOC_frame_FRAMENUM.mat where LOC = [10] and FRAMENUM = [1,100]: raw tif files from location 10 as examples for the frame alignment code - aligned_images.zip: ZIP file containing cropped and sligned sub-image data from loc4/well26 and loc10/well21 - avg_well1.tif and avg_well1.mat: averaged well data used for image alignment - first_frames.zip: ZIP file continaing the first frames (mat and tif tiles) for use in compiling the average well image
